profiles.name: 01 Recording
profiles.description: Three-button podcast recording control for Audacity or REAPER. Button A starts/stops recording (Shift+R in Audacity — enable via Preferences > Recording > Append Record). Button B pauses/resumes (P key in Audacity). Button C mutes/unmutes your system microphone via a global shortcut — assign Ctrl+Shift+M to 'Mute Microphone' in your OS or audio app settings.
